name: Rescue Team: Attack of the Atom
short_description: The world is on the edge of disaster, and it’s down to you to step in and save the day, again! You’ll join a team of familiar faces to lead the effort to uncover the scope of the issue and guide humanity to a safer and greener future!
detailed_description:
The world is on the edge of disaster, and it’s down to you to step in and save the day, again! A critical bug was discovered in the software used at numerous nuclear power plants that has triggered failures at multiple facilities. You must lead the effort to uncover the scope of the issue, prevent catastrophic damage, and guide humanity to a safer and greener future!

Join a dedicated team of familiar faces as you race against time to reduce contamination, patch the compromised systems, and manage other emergencies. You’ll need to tackle complex challenges, make tough decisions, and implement plans to protect both people and the planet.

Transition outdated nuclear power sources to renewable energy sources, such as wind turbines, and work to create a safer, more sustainable energy infrastructure.

With the whole world at risk, and lives on the line - can you rise to the challenge?

Download and play today to secure the future!

In Rescue Team: Attack of the Atom, as in any time manager you have to accurately calculate the time for building, collecting resources and timely use of bonuses.

The game has a large variety of buildings and unique items, collecting them you will perform tasks and participate in unique adventures.

Collect a squad of rescuers, perform a variety of tasks to save people and animals, restore buildings and extinguish fires, and most importantly - save humanity from nuclear catastrophe.

65 levels to complete

Step-by-step level guide

Catchy downloadable Original Soundtrack

Beautiful desktop wallpapers

Upgrade equipment, level up heroes

Find all the blueprints for the Multipurpose Cleaner

Find all parts for Institute of Eco-Energetics

Achievements
